message:
test(fcp-ratelimit): expand rate limiter test coverage across all algorithms

Add comprehensive edge-case and regression tests to all five
fcp-ratelimit modules:

fcp.rs (109 lines):
- compute_token_cost: one-byte-per-token, u64 overflow detection
- utilization_bps: boundary cases (1 remaining, small limits)
- EnforcementOutcome: rejected with/without violation, retry_after_ms
  fallback from backpressure signal
- config_from_core: burst=0 produces no burst allowance

headers.rs (129 lines):
- RateLimitHeaders parsing: standard, draft-ietf, and github formats
- Edge cases: missing headers, zero values, negative remaining
- apply_to_response: header injection and format verification
- Draft IETF policy field round-trip

leaky_bucket.rs (132 lines):
- Refill math: fractional tokens, zero elapsed, large time gaps
- Drain order: FIFO guarantee across multiple requests
- Concurrent drip timing with time advancement
- Capacity boundary (exactly full, over-full rejection)

sliding_window.rs (121 lines):
- Window boundary transitions and sub-window accumulation
- Weighted interpolation between current and previous windows
- Counter cleanup after window rotation
- Zero-length window edge case

token_bucket.rs (122 lines):
- Burst allowance above steady-state rate
- Token accumulation caps at bucket capacity
- Concurrent consumption from shared bucket
- Refill precision with sub-millisecond intervals

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
